ques: Search for recent news related to Trump and summarize the main points.
answer: BBC's recent Trump coverage centers on foreign policy: a US–Iran peace deal (Strait of Hormuz reopening, signing due Friday) plus claims of removing Iranian oil and "loving" inflation; renewed criticism of Israel over Lebanon; and Iran dominating the G7 summit in France. He reacted to Starmer's resignation (calling him "a lovely man") and called MP Andy Burnham "extremely liberal." Domestically, a federal judge cancelled an H-1B visa fee (a legal setback). Lighter stories: unveiling a Qatar-donated Boeing 747-8 "flying White House" and his pending first 2026 World Cup match appearance.
